retrieved_result: Spa Town Spa Town Cheltenham was little more than a village until the early 19th century, with the river running down the High Street (for “river” read “stinking sludge”) with stepping stones across it, and stray farm animals milling about, its principle employment opportunities being brewing and the knittin

history.title: Spa Town
history.description: Spa Town Cheltenham was little more than a village until the early 19th century, with the river running down the High Street (for “river” read “stinking sludge”) with stepping stones across it, and stray farm animals milling about, its principle employment opportunities being brewing and the knittin
